description: Deployment topology contract: four deploy modes, derived capability flags, legal auth combinations, and sync roles. Spec: docs/deployment/deployment-topology.md.

standalone.purpose: Local one-command Docker deployment for a person or small team.
standalone.notes: sync_publisher may be overridden to true via CAPABILITY_SYNC_PUBLISHER for local linkage debugging.

cloud.purpose: Official cloud deployment: admins ingest, non-admins are read-only consumers via viewer roles.
cloud.notes: Invite-only provisioning, default global role viewer; TLS termination required (C-6).

intranet.purpose: Intranet deployment embedded in the company portal via same-site reverse-proxied iframe; pull-only.
hard_constraints: ingestion capability MUST NOT be overridable to true
comments/likes/ratings/adoption stay local and never flow back to extranet
backend must only be reachable through the trusted gateway

extranet.purpose: Public internet deployment with industry-standard SSO that publishes collected and finished data to intranet consumers.
hard_constraints: SYNC_SERVICE_TOKENS must be non-empty at startup
feed endpoints authenticate by service token only, never cookie session

gates.scheduler: ingestion/daily_pipeline jobs are not enqueued when false
gates.frontend: ingestion pages and import/fetch/create-source entries hidden when false

gates.scheduler: sync_pull job enqueued every SYNC_PULL_INTERVAL_SECONDS when SYNC_PULL_ENABLED

embedding.note: embedding is an informational flag surfaced via GET /api/meta/runtime. frame-ancestors is always emitted from EMBED_FRAME_ANCESTORS regardless of mode, and CSRF defaults come from the independent per-mode csrf_default table; neither behavior is derived from this flag.

gates.frontend: topbar search is rendered when GET /api/meta/runtime returns capabilities.search=true

runtime_endpoint.auth_membership_mapping: Sanitized read-only default workspace and department workspace mappings for /users policy display; must not expose secrets or provider tokens.

startup_failfast_rules: DEPLOY_MODE not in [standalone, cloud, intranet, extranet]

AUTH_MODE not in modes[DEPLOY_MODE].allowed_auth_modes (full per-mode whitelist; intranet therefore requires intranet_header, and public-facing cloud/extranet reject intranet_header header-forgery logins)
AUTH_SESSION_SECRET empty (all auth modes sign session cookies; validated at API, scheduler and worker startup)
AUTH_TRUSTED_PROXY_CIDRS non-empty but contains an invalid CIDR (fail-closed)
AUTH_MODE=oidc and neither OIDC_ISSUER nor explicit OIDC_AUTHORIZATION_ENDPOINT/OIDC_TOKEN_ENDPOINT is configured
sync_consumer enabled with SYNC_PULL_ENABLED=true but SYNC_REMOTE_BASE_URL or SYNC_REMOTE_TOKEN missing
startup_warnings: AUTH_MODE=intranet_header without AUTH_TRUSTED_PROXY_CIDRS: identity headers are trusted from any peer; the trusted gateway must be the only ingress (logged as a warning, not fail-fast, to keep existing gateway-only deployments bootable)
invariants: sync direction is one-way extranet -> intranet; intranet feedback never flows back
feed endpoints are side-effect free and replayable
company SQL export contract is unchanged by sync
secrets/tokens/cookies/.env never enter feed or sync packages
iframe embedding only via same-site reverse proxy; SameSite=None is forbidden
